description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline for an R package using the stages dependencies, build, test, integration, and deploy. In the dependencies stage add a mirror-packages job using the docker.io/jangorecki/r-base-dev image that runs `mkdir -p bus/$CI_BUILD_NAME/cran/src/contrib` and `Rscript -e 'source(Sys.getenv("CI_TOOLS")); mirror.packages(packages.dcf("DESCRIPTION","all"), repos=c(Sys.getenv("CRAN_MIRROR"), Sys.getenv("BIOC_MIRROR")), repodir="bus/mirror-packages/cran")'`, then stores the bus directory as a two‑week artifact. In the build stage add a build job with image docker.io/jangorecki/r-builder that depends on mirror-packages and executes `Rscript -e 'install.packages(c("data.table","R6","knitr"), repos=file.path("file:",normalizePath("bus/mirror-packages/cran")))'`, `rm -r bus`, `echo "Revision:" $CI_BUILD_REF >> ./DESCRIPTION`, `R CMD build .`, `mkdir -p bus/$CI_BUILD_NAME/cran/src/contrib`, `mv $(ls -1t data.cube_*.tar.gz | head -n 1) bus/$CI_BUILD_NAME/cran/src/contrib/.`, and `Rscript -e 'tools::write_PACKAGES(contrib.url("bus/build/cran"), addFiles=TRUE, fields="Revision")'`, publishing bus as an artifact. In the test stage add three jobs (test-r-release, test-r-release-cran, test-r-3.1.0-cran) all using docker.io/jangorecki/r-builder (or r-3.1.0 for the last) that each create `bus/$CI_BUILD_NAME`, install package dependencies from the mirrored CRAN, copy the built tarball from `../build/cran`, and run `R CMD check` (with `--as-cran` for the cran jobs) while always uploading the bus artifact and setting the appropriate _R_CHECK variables. In the integration stage add an integration job (runs only on master) with the same r-builder image that builds an integration.R script via a series of echo commands, runs checks with `Rscript -e 'source("integration.R"); sapply(names(test.jobs), check.test, simplify=FALSE)'`, copies mirrored packages, writes PACKAGES files, installs the package into a temporary OpenCRAN layout, generates HTML docs with `make.packages.html`, and finally copies libraries, docs and PDFs back into `bus/integration/cran`, storing bus as an artifact. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job (runs only on master, uses docker.io/ubuntu, environment production) that creates a public directory, copies the integration CRAN repository into it, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
